t_ch: 是属于所有人的故事。
t_en: It's a story that belongs to everyone.

t_ch: 加油，就像无名客间不成文的规定：勇往直前，贯彻始终。
t_en: Keep going! It's like an unwritten rule among the Nameless: press forward and see it through to the end.

t_ch: 事不宜迟，你动身前往贝洛伯格…
t_en: Time is of the essence. You head to Belobog...

t_ch: 放心，定不辱使命。
t_en: Rest assured, I won't let you down.

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。听说你会来，我把希儿也叫上了。
t_en: It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. I heard you were coming, so I invited Seele as well.

t_ch: 都怪「毁灭」，孤儿院的孩子现在都不敢出门…不提了，你们打算聊什么？
t_en: The kids at the orphanage are too scared to even go outside now because of the Destruction... Never mind that. What did you want to talk about?

t_ch: 谈及《如我所书》。
t_en: Talk about As I've Written.

t_ch: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
t_en: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

t_ch: …听说这次全银河都抖了三抖，你们能顺利解决，挺行啊。
t_en: ...I heard the whole cosmos was shaken up by what you did. Pretty impressive how you managed to sort everything out.

t_ch: 多亏托帕小姐带来的反铁墓疫苗，加上我们及时关闭了造物引擎，贝洛伯格才没有再次遭遇危机。
t_en: Thanks to Ms. Topaz's anti-Irontomb vaccine, and our timely shutdown of the Engine of Creation, Belobog was able to avoid another crisis.

t_ch: 别担心，重建计划没有受到影响。但不得不说…宇宙的一丝涟漪，落到边陲星球就是一股滔天巨浪啊。
t_en: Don't worry, the reconstruction plan hasn't been affected. But I must say... even a tiny ripple in the universe becomes a tsunami when it reaches frontier planets.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯也是如此。同为发展中的文明，我们愿意为它的未来出一份力。善意就像火炬，传递下去才能烧得更旺。
t_en: The same goes for Amphoreus. As a similarly developing civilization, we are willing to contribute to its future. Goodwill is like a torch. It can only burn brighter when it is passed on.

t_ch: 冠冕堂皇的话我不会说。总之，该帮的忙我肯定会帮。
t_en: I'm not one for fancy words. But if you need help, I'll definitely be there.

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}，我也有件事要拜托你。待会儿跟我来一趟。
t_en: Oh right, {NICKNAME}. I've got something to ask you. Come with me later.

t_ch: 难道说…
t_en: Could it be...

t_ch: 什么事这么神秘？
t_en: What's so secretive?

t_ch: 别问那么多，来就对了。肯定不是逗你玩啊。
t_en: Don't ask, just be there. I'm not playing around.

t_ch: 荣誉队员？你可算来了！我的腿快要没知觉了……
t_en: Honorary member! Finally, you're here! My legs are going numb...

t_ch: 虎克，你这是…
t_en: Hook! What are you...

t_ch: 听克拉拉说，她用洞洞机帮忙挖矿，结果功率太大摔坏了腿。恐怕…再也不能坐星际航班了。
t_en: I heard from Clara that she was using Diggertron to help with mining, but the power was too much, and she fell and broke her leg. I'm afraid... she won't be able to take interstellar flights anymore.

t_ch: 她想听你讲些新鲜的天外故事，免得留下遗憾。
t_en: She wants to hear your fresh stories from beyond the sky, so she won't have any regrets.

t_ch: 娜塔莎医生怎么说？
t_en: What did Dr. Natasha say?

t_ch: 洞洞机有那么大功率？
t_en: Does the Diggertron really pack that much power?

t_ch: 总感觉疑点重重…
t_en: Something feels really fishy here...

t_ch: 嗯…你就当作是真的，别太在意细节。
t_en: Hmm... Just take it as the truth. Don't worry too much about the details.

t_ch: 荣誉队员，你会帮虎克的，对吧？
t_en: Honorary member, you'll help Hook out, right?

t_ch: 既然你们都这么说了……
t_en: Well, since you all say so...

t_ch: 你将《如我所书》的故事逐句复述给虎克听，尤其是那些激动人心的冒险故事——当然，是用浴场精灵的口吻。
t_en: You retell the story of As I've Written to Hook sentence by sentence, especially those thrilling adventure parts. Naturally, done in the voice of a bath sprite.

t_ch: 呜哇~传说、星系、大怪兽…好酷！
t_en: Wowza~ Legends, galaxies, giant monsters... so cool!

t_ch: 我早就说过，天外好玩的东西多了去，尤利安他们还不信！我这就去告诉他们！
t_en: I knew there are so many interesting things beyond the sky, but Julian and others wouldn't believe me! I'm gonna tell them right now!

t_ch: 虎克「噌」的一下从床上蹦起，一溜烟跑远了。
t_en: Hook sprang up from the bed with a "whoosh" and dashed away in a flash.

t_ch: 妙手回春啊大夫。
t_en: Nice work, doc! You're a real miracle worker!

t_ch: 她不是摔坏了腿吗？
t_en: Didn't she hurt her leg in that fall?

t_ch: 跑得比我都快。
t_en: Runs even faster than me.

t_ch: 可能是你的故事太精彩，让她不治而愈了？
t_en: Perhaps your story was so fascinating that it cured her without any treatment?

t_ch: 嘻…我承认刚才在陪虎克闹着玩。她就是想见你一面，孩子们都这样。
t_en: Hehe... I admit I was just playing around earlier. She just wanted to see you. Children are all like that.

t_ch: 搞半天是虚惊一场…算了，人没事就好。
t_en: All that fuss for nothing... Well, at least she's okay.

t_ch: 我差不多该走了。你看着点虎克，省得她又整出什么幺蛾子……
t_en: I should get going. Keep an eye on Hook. Make sure she doesn't pull any weird stunts...

t_ch: 孩子们的活力就像用不完似的，年轻真好啊。
t_en: The children's energy seems endless. Ah, to be young...

t_ch: 说起来，那本书似乎很有趣。也分给我一册如何？下次再有不听话的小孩，我就用这本书哄他。
t_en: By the way, that book seems really interesting. Would you mind sharing a copy with me? Next time a child is being difficult, I can use it to comfort them.

t_ch: 感觉你把它当成童话了…
t_en: Feels like you're treating this like a fairy tale...

t_ch: 童话有什么不好？你的故事里有抗争、勇气和爱，正是孩子们应该学习的品质。
t_en: What's wrong with fairy tales? That story contains defiance, courage, and love. Exactly the qualities children should learn.

t_ch: 而且，童话的创作难度很高，你必须相信那些美好的事物存在——依我看，有时大人比孩子更需要童话。
t_en: Besides, writing fairy tales is quite challenging. You must believe in the existence of beautiful things to write about them. In my opinion, sometimes adults need fairy tales even more than children do.

t_ch: 既然你都这么说了……
t_en: Since you've said so...

t_ch: 谢谢。再帮我签个名吧，顺带写一句寄语。记得有个词专门形容这种行为…签售，对，就当为签售做练习。
t_en: Thank you. Now, could you sign this for me? And add a little message too. There's a word for this... ah yes, book signing. Consider this practice for future book signings.

t_ch: （寄语啊…写点什么呢？）
t_en: (A message... what should I write?)

t_ch: 愿我们于星海重逢。
t_en: May we meet again among the stars.

t_ch: 献给每个憧憬英雄的人。
t_en: To everyone who dreams of being a hero.

t_ch: 这是属于翁法罗斯的故事。
t_en: This is the story of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 一二三四五，丹恒打虚卒。
t_en: One, two, three, four, five... Dan Heng and Voidranger jive.

t_ch: 写得真不错。这样一来，我就是你第一本独家签售的拥有者了。
t_en: Well written indeed. This makes me the first owner of your exclusively signed copy.

t_ch: 我会将这本书一直传承下去，五百年、一千年…只要孩子们还会长大，孩子的孩子还有孩子，它就不会被遗忘。
t_en: I will pass this book down through generations, five hundred years, a thousand years... As long as children keep growing up, and children's children have children, it will never be forgotten.

t_ch: 毕竟，有些事必须被铭记。比如「那位」大守护者，比如星间发生过的一切抗争……
t_en: After all, some things must be remembered. Like "that" Supreme Guardian, like all the acts of defiance that occurred among the stars...

t_ch: 老…娜塔莎医生，我把人带来了！那本书在哪？里面的细节我记不住。
t_en: D—Dr. Natasha, I brought them! Where's that book? I can't remember all the details in it.

t_ch: 那，就让我把故事再讲一遍吧？
t_en: Well then, shall I tell you the story again?

t_ch: 故事里说翁法罗斯有过六个月亮，那他们晚上岂不是不用点灯？
t_en: The story says Amphoreus had six moons. Guess they didn't need to turn on the lights at night, huh?

t_ch: 可他们没有太阳，只有一种叫「黎明机器」的东西，背在最高的造物引擎身上。
t_en: But they had no Sun, only something called the "Dawn Device" mounted on the back of the tallest Engine of Creation.

t_ch: 安珂，你又听故事听一半。什么造物引擎呀，那叫「泰坦」！
t_en: Anka, you're only getting half the story again. It's not called the "Engine of Creation." It's called the "Titan"!

t_ch: 真有人能把太阳背在身上吗？我可不是好骗的小孩。
t_en: Can someone really carry the Sun on their back? I'm not some gullible kid you can fool.

t_ch: 我作证，我就背过。
t_en: I can testify. I carried that Sun myself once.

t_ch: 你背过黎明机器？那我还打得过史瓦罗大叔呢！
t_en: You carried the Dawn Device? Yeah right, and I could totally take on Uncle Svarog!

t_ch: 你不信我，还不信虎克老大吗？
t_en: If you don't believe me, will you at least believe Boss Hook?

t_ch: 虎克老大做担保…总感觉更加可疑了！
t_en: Hook's vouching for it... somehow that makes it even more suspicious!

t_ch: 不过…贝洛伯格，会不会有一天也会像翁法罗斯那样，从宇宙里消失，只留下一本书呢？
t_en: But... will Belobog one day vanish from the universe like the Amphoreans did, leaving behind nothing except a book?

t_ch: 那样的话，我们就再也吃不到跳跳糖，再也不能听娜塔莎姐姐讲故事……
t_en: If that happens, we'll never get to eat popping candies again, or listen to Natasha's stories...

t_ch: 再也玩不了捉迷藏，也不能去擂台边给卢卡哥哥加油……
t_en: No more playing hide-and-seek, or cheering for big brother Luka at the arena...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯没有消失！
t_en: Amphoreus hasn't disappeared!

t_ch: 我不会让贝洛伯格消失。
t_en: I won't let Belobog disappear.

t_ch: 嗯！如果真有那一天，我会像翁法罗斯的英雄们一样挺身而出，保护磐岩镇的大家。
t_en: Yeah! If that day ever comes, I'll stand tall like the heroes of Amphoreus and protect everyone in Boulder Town!

t_ch: 然后，我们可以和翁法罗斯签一份和仙舟一样的…贸易决定！
t_en: Then, we can sign a trade... adornment with the Amphoreans, just like we did with Xianzhou!

t_ch: 安珂，你又没记住名字，那叫「互惠贸易协定」！
t_en: Anke, you forgot the name again. It's called the Mutual Benefit Trade Agreement!

t_ch: 这不是重点啦。重点是，我们可以去奥赫玛泡温泉，坐大地兽…还有，我想养一只小奇美拉！
t_en: That's not the point! The point is, we can go to the hot springs in Okhema, ride dromases... and, I want to raise a little chimera!

t_ch: 不过…我们真的能像虎克老大一样坐星际航班，去翁法罗斯旅行吗？
t_en: But... can we really take an interstellar flight to Amphoreus like Boss Hook?

t_ch: 乘坐星穹列车也不错哦。
t_en: Taking the Astral Express isn't bad either!

t_ch: 在那之前，要好好长大！
t_en: Before that, you need to grow up properly!

t_ch: 唉…真想、真想快点长大呀！
t_en: *sigh*... I really, really wish I could grow up faster!

t_ch: 哈哈， 今天也没抢到《如我所书》的另一卷，看来我还是来得不够早啊。
t_en: Haha, I couldn't snag another volume of As I've Written today either. Guess I still didn't show up early enough!

t_ch: 你还有时间和我们抢书？听小道消息，铁墓感染了几个旧自动机兵，是你们后勤部门负责处理吧？
t_en: You still have time to compete with us for books? Word on the street is that Irontomb infected a few old automatons... Isn't your Logistics Department supposed to handle that?

t_ch: 还有这回事？
t_en: Wait, really?

t_ch: 影响严重吗？
t_en: How bad is it?

t_ch: 嘘嘘！要是让大家听见，恐怕得登上《水晶日报》的头版头条了。
t_en: Shhhh! If everyone hears about this, it'll make the front page of Crystal Daily for sure!

t_ch: 确有其事，但好在机械聚落的人及时发现，没闹出大乱子。善后工作得花上好几个晚上，不买本书打发时间，可太难熬了。
t_en: It did happen, but thankfully the folks at the Robot Settlement caught it in time before things got out of hand. The cleanup's gonna take several nights, and without a book to kill time, it's gonna be a real drag.

t_ch: 你们负责军备，前阵时间也不清闲吧？
t_en: You're in charge of military supplies, must've been pretty busy lately, huh?

t_ch: 决战铁墓那段时间，裂界造物的活动也愈发频繁了。我被派驻值守禁区，要是不买到《如我所书》的另一卷，晚上就只能在帐篷里无所事事地挨冻。
t_en: During the final battle with Irontomb, Fragmentum creations became increasingly active. I was assigned to guard duty at the restricted zone, and if I couldn't get my hands on another volume of As I've Written, I'd have nothing to do but freeze in my tent at night.

t_ch: 唉，宇宙另一边的滔天巨浪，传到我们这儿也是轩然大波。
t_en: *sigh* A massive wave from the other edge of the universe would still cause quite a stir when it reaches here.

t_ch: 虽然觉得翁法罗斯离我们很遥远，但是看着他们在一次次轮回里挣扎的努力，看到最后整个银河摒弃嫌隙，一同对抗毁灭的决心……
t_en: Although Amphoreus seemed so distant from us, watching their struggles through each cycle, and seeing how the entire cosmos ultimately cast aside their differences to unite against the Destruction...

t_ch: 总觉得自己的努力虽然渺小，但也不是那么无足轻重。
t_en: I feel like my efforts, though small, aren't completely insignificant after all.

t_ch: 假如我也是黄金裔就好了！像「捷足的赛法利娅」，每天值班结束就用神速力嗖地一下溜回家，躺在暖洋洋的被窝里……
t_en: If only I were a Chrysos Heir too! Like "Swift-Footed Cifera" I could just zoom home with godly speed after my shift and snuggle up in my cozy warm bed...

t_ch: 咦，先别说先别说，我看到的部分里，她还没登场呢！
t_en: Wait wait, hold on. From what I've seen so far, she hasn't even shown up yet!

t_ch: 你们买的都是哪一卷？
t_en: Which volume did you all get?

t_ch: 我这本是上卷。
t_en: This is just Volume 1.

t_ch: 我这本是下卷。
t_en: This is Volume 2.

t_ch: 你们交换一下不就好了！
t_en: Why don't you just swap with each other?

t_ch: 怎么会有人从下卷看起？
t_en: Who starts reading from the Volume 2?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，《如我所书》这么炙手可热，有得看就不错了，哪还管得上是哪一卷呢。
t_en: Hehe, As I've Written is a hot potato right now. We're lucky to get our hands on any volume at all, who cares which one it is!

t_ch: 既然如此，我们就交换着看吧。不过，你可不准在书上乱涂乱画哦。
t_en: In that case, let's take turns reading it. But hey, no doodling or scribbling in the book, alright?

t_ch: 太好了！放心，吉娜，我会好好爱惜这本书的！
t_en: Perfect! Don't worry, Gina, I'll take good care of this book!

t_ch: 听说，符玄也参加了那场战役…
t_en: I hear Fu Xuan was also in that battle...

t_ch: 所以啊，师妹，大变将至，何不来玉阙做太卜？这样我也能喘口气。
t_en: So, junior soror, great changes are coming. Why not join the Yuque as the Master Diviner? That way I could catch a breather too.

t_ch: 爻光将军说笑了。留在罗浮，本座定能继承将军之位；调职玉阙，就只能一辈子做个小小的太卜。哪边更有前途，我岂会分不清？
t_en: General Yao Guang must be joking. If I stay on the Luofu, I'm sure to inherit the position of General. If I transfer to the Yuque, I'd be nothing but a mere Master Diviner for life. How could I not see which path holds more promise?

t_ch: 师妹这么乐观，可真叫人欢喜。看来「乐观将军」是罗浮特色呀——你的访客到了，我也该走了。
t_en: Junior soror's optimism is truly delightful. Looks like "Optimistic General" is a Luofu specialty. Your visitor's here, so I should get going.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}？正巧，本座正打算造访星穹列车，你便先找上门来了。有什么事？
t_en: {NICKNAME}? What perfect timing. I was just about to visit the Astral Express. What's the matter?

t_ch: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
t_en: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

t_ch: …得此书前，本座只知此战斩获金血，是为大胜。却不知那金血中，竟有这样一番可歌可泣的故事。
t_en: ...Before obtaining this book, I only knew that golden blood was reaped in this battle, and thus it was deemed a great victory. I did not know that within that golden blood lay such a stirring and tragic story.

t_ch: 铁墓陨落后不久，联盟便召集诸位将军，共同商讨下一步行动。此书中的记述，应当能为他们再添几分助力。
t_en: Shortly after the fall of Irontomb, the Alliance gathered all the generals to discuss their next course of action. The records in this book should provide them with additional support.

t_ch: 要怎么做？
t_en: What should we do?

t_ch: 放心好了，戏曲、说书、相声…对于脍炙人口的故事，罗浮从不缺乏传播的手段。
t_en: Rest assured, whether through opera, storytelling, or crosstalk... The Luofu never lacks ways to spread stories that capture people's hearts.

t_ch: 何况联盟这些年四处征战，骁勇克敌的故事也讲了不少。英雄一词，在民众心中本就有分量。
t_en: Besides, the Alliance has been fighting battles everywhere in recent years, and there's been plenty of tales about their valor and victories. The word "hero" already carries weight in people's hearts.

t_ch: 这部《如我所书》定能在联盟内部如实传唱。但听你所述，想让它为寰宇铭记，仅凭罗浮一舰恐怕不够。
t_en: The faithful adaptation of this As I've Written within the Alliance is most definitely assured. But from what you've said, if we want it to be remembered throughout the cosmos, the Luofu alone may not be enough.

t_ch: 此事需要天舶司伸出援手。去找驭空聊聊吧，本座会把前因后果转告她的。
t_en: This matter requires the Sky-Faring Commission's assistance. Go talk to Yukong, I will inform her of the full situation.

t_ch: 被神明封闭的虚假天空，挑战禁忌、前赴后继的探索…听起来像是某种寓言呢。
t_en: A false sky sealed by a pantheon, an exploration of challenging taboos one after another... Sounds like some kind of fable.

t_ch: 我可以给你一个承诺：《如我所书》一事，天舶司必将鼎力协助。
t_en: I can make you a promise that the Sky-Faring Commission will provide its full support for matters relating to As I've Written.

t_ch: 今后，各仙舟间的联系将愈发紧密，我会委托商船借机将《如我所书》出口到友舰。凭借鸣火商会的便利，这件事肯定能办得更加妥当吧。
t_en: From now on, the connections between Xianzhou ships will grow even closer, and I'll have merchant vessels export As I've Written to our allied fleets. With the convenience of the Whistling Flames guild, this matter should be handled quite smoothly.

t_ch: 铁墓一战，罗浮虽然取胜，但也不是毫发无损。你能平安归来，实属幸事。
t_en: Though the Luofu emerged victorious in the battle of Irontomb, we did not escape unscathed. Your safe return is truly a blessing.

t_ch: 都是伙伴们的功劳。
t_en: It's all thanks to my companions.

t_ch: 没错，我超幸运的。
t_en: Yep, I'm super lucky!

t_ch: 记得还是飞行士的时候，我也常和伙伴们开着星槎，四处冒险。即便每次都能化险为夷，回来后总是免不了一顿检讨。
t_en: Back when I was a pilot, I used to go on adventures everywhere with my companions in our starskiff. Even though we always managed to get out of sticky situations, we'd inevitably get a stern talking-to when we returned.

t_ch: 那是段年少轻狂的岁月。若要我再选一次，大抵还会走上相同的路——就像你在书中对「开拓」的自述那样。
t_en: Those were the reckless days of my youth. If I had to choose again, I'd probably walk the same path, same as your account of the Trailblaze in your book.

t_ch: 我想问个私人问题：你对翁法罗斯的这趟旅途作何评价？
t_en: I'd like to ask you a personal question: What do you think about this journey to Amphoreus?

t_ch: 一次寻常的开拓。
t_en: Just another Trailblaze.

t_ch: 席卷半个银河的危机在你看来仍算「寻常」，果然是艺高人胆大啊。
t_en: A crisis that engulfs half the cosmos is still "ordinary" to you... As expected from someone whose great skill breeds great courage.

t_ch: 但无论如何，它都为你留下了一段回忆，不是吗？
t_en: But no matter what, it left you with a memory, didn't it?

t_ch: 一场难忘的旅程。
t_en: An unforgettable journey.

t_ch: 难忘的旅程啊，看来这份回忆会被你珍藏很久呢。
t_en: And what an unforgettable journey it is. I can tell you'll cherish this memory for a long time.

t_ch: 前所未有的回忆。
t_en: An unprecedented memory.

t_ch: 是嘛，这么美好的回忆，都令我有些羡慕了呢。
t_en: Is that so? Such wonderful memories... I'm actually getting a bit envious.

t_ch: 「记忆」是种奇妙的东西。有时，我甚至觉得它是{RUBY_B#浮黎}流光天君{RUBY_E#}的恶作剧。
t_en: "Memory" is quite a peculiar thing. Sometimes, I even think it's a prank by the {RUBY_B#Fuli}Glowswather{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 无论狐人、天人还是持明，都有着超乎短生种的寿命。弊端之一，就是不易忘记。
t_en: Whether foxians, the Celestials, or the Vidyadhara, they all possess lifespans far beyond those of short-life species. One of the downsides is that it's not easy to forget.

t_ch: 对于我们，历史像昨天发生的事。也正是因为战争的回忆仍旧清晰，联盟才会枕戈待旦。
t_en: For us, history feels like it happened yesterday. It is precisely because the memories of war remain vivid that the Alliance stays vigilant and ready.

t_ch: 如今军团蠢蠢欲动，一场恶战在所难免。我们无法松懈，也不敢松懈……
t_en: The Legion is growing restless, and a fierce battle seems inevitable. We cannot, and dare not, let our guard down...

t_ch: …哎，瞧瞧我，在说些什么呢。星神也好，战事也罢，话题太过宏大，不应让它们消耗太多心神。
t_en: ...Ah, look at me, what am I saying? Be it the Aeons or the war, these topics are too grand. We shouldn't let them consume too much of our thoughts.

t_ch: 《如我所书》一事，我会尽力去办，绝不让英雄事迹被星空埋没。
t_en: Regarding As I've Written, I will do my utmost, and won't let these heroic deeds be buried by the stars.

t_ch: 他日得罪负荆去，今朝浴血奏凯来。悬锋故邦皆沦丧，烈火分劈炼金刚。
t_en: That day he left in disgrace, bearing thorns in apology. Today he returns, bathed in blood, triumphant. Kremnos, his homeland, lay all in ruin, split asunder by blazing fire that forged adamant.

t_ch: 今日我们不说那哀地里亚的渡冥仙子，且说那「背芒灵官迈德漠斯」。这迈德漠斯，诨名万敌。万敌二字，乃万众难敌之万敌，万人不敌之万敌！
t_en: Yet today we shall not speak of the Psychopomp of Aidonia, but of "Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden," and bears the byname Mydei. The name Mydei that signifies "a foe that no multitude could withstand," as well as "a foe whom none among ten thousand could overcome!"

t_ch: （叫好）。
t_en: (cheer)

t_ch: 好，好！
t_en: Alright, alright!

t_ch: （沉默）。
t_en: (keep silent)

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 风割旌旗，雨打残军。遍原哀鸿，但闻狮啸。你道这万敌是何许人也？其乃悬锋王储，为父不容，数载冥海沉浮，炼就不坏之身，蒙千面童姥所召，遂投身逐火大业。
t_en: The wind tore through the banners, and rain beat down upon the remnants of the army. Across the plain rose cries of sorrow, yet only the roar of the lion was heard. And you ask: What manner of man was this Mydei? He was the crown prince of Kremnos, cast off by his father, drifting for years upon the Sea of Souls, where he forged an indestructible body. Summoned by the Thousand-Faced Matriarch, he threw himself into the great cause of Flame-Chase.

t_ch: 其后，斩黑潮、过试炼，饮鲜血佳酿，退灾厄惑星；平宿怨、护圣城，归沉沦故土，登玛瑙王座。
t_en: Thereafter, he hewed down the black tide, passed the trial, drank the crimson brew of blood, drove back the calamitous star of misfortune. He settled old grievances, guarded the holy city, reclaimed his sunken homeland, and ascended the Agate Throne.

t_ch: 这可真是：怒狮百战踞高座，悬锋威名永流芳。
t_en: Now this is epic: Like a battle-hardened lion on its throne, Kremnos's mighty name shall echo through the ages.

t_ch: （叫好）。
t_en: (cheer)

t_ch: 好，好！
t_en: Alright, alright!

t_ch: （沉默）。
t_en: (keep silent)

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
t_en: Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!

t_ch: 一朝离乡背井，百年辗转飘零。又是那，千劫轮回、万火同归。
t_en: Once he left his homeland, and for a hundred years he wandered in exile. Again came the cycle of a thousand tribulations, the return of ten thousand flames to one.

t_ch: 今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，且说那「负阳逐火白厄真君」。这白厄真君生于村舍巷陌，起于微末之中。何奈黑潮无情，凌虐乡野，瓦尽无存，唯他一人得生。
t_en: Today, we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, but of the "Lord Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light." Born in a humble village of bucolic background, Lord Phainon rose from the most modest beginnings. Alas, the merciless black tide ravaged the countryside, leaving nothing but ruins, and he alone survived.

t_ch: （叹息）。
t_en: (sigh)

t_ch: 唉，你说这……
t_en: *sigh* This is so...

t_ch: （沉默）。
t_en: (keep silent)

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 白厄真君先拜于树庭居士门下，后又追随千面童姥。负日逐火，讨获十二火种，百折千回，终得再造生机。
t_en: Lord Phainon first apprenticed under the Sages of the Grove, and later followed the Thousand-Faced Matriarch. Carrying the sun and chasing flame, he sought out the twelve Coreflames. Through countless trials and tribulations, he at last won the chance to remake the world.

t_ch: 谁曾想满纸预言不过虚妄，救世壮举皆是徒劳。凡众的生生死死，竟成了养育「铁墓」的温床。
t_en: Yet who could have foreseen that the prophecies inscribed on countless pages were but empty delusions, that the grand feats of salvation proved vain? The endless cycles of mortal birth and death became naught but the fertile soil that nourished the "Irontomb."

t_ch: 这不愿为虎作伥的痴儿，从头走起，再赴漫漫逐火路；重入轮回，引火焚身作柴薪。
t_en: This stubborn youth, unwilling to serve as the wolf's thrall, began anew, setting forth once more upon the endless road of Flame-Chase. He entered the cycle again, taking flames into his own flesh as kindling.

t_ch: 那可真是：惊回首，乱石瓦砾墟场。销尽也。
t_en: And truly it was thus: Startled, he turned his head only to behold a wasteland of shattered stone and broken tiles. All had perished, all was spent.

t_ch: 空归去，依然稻实垂穗、炊烟斜阳。又近黄昏。
t_en: Returning in vain, he found yet again the heavy heads of ripened grain, the cooking smoke curling beneath the slanting sun. And dusk was near once more.

t_ch: （叹息）。
t_en: (sigh)

t_ch: 唉，你说这……
t_en: *sigh* This is so...

t_ch: （沉默）。
t_en: (keep silent)

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
t_en: Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!

t_ch: 一令扶摇九天应，三军迢递银河来。天地英雄皆同力，铁墓扬灰挫骨销。
t_en: With but one command, the Nine Heavens answered, and the three armies marched across the distant Cosmos. Heroes of heaven and earth joined their strength, and the Irontomb was ground to dust, its bones scattered and destroyed.

t_ch: 今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，亦不说那负阳逐火白厄真君。单说那十二金仙讨大君，打得那叫一个天摇地动，那叫一个难解难分!
t_en: Today we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, nor of Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light. We speak only of the Twelve Golden Immortals who struck against the Archlord, and what a battle it was! Heaven and earth quaked, the struggle was fierce and unyielding!

t_ch: 列位，你说那大敌「铁墓」，何等强悍？其本是「遍智天君」造物，为「烬灭祸祖」所掳，暗种毁灭胚芽，一朝萌发，怕是要为银河带来千年难遇的灾异啊。
t_en: Tell me, my friends, what manner of adversary was this Irontomb? It was the creation of the Wisdomwalker, seized by the Ruin Author, who planted within it the seed of Destruction. When that seed at last sprouted, it threatened to bring upon the cosmos a calamity not seen for a thousand years.

t_ch: 今日，我们就讲这情事细细分说。
t_en: Today, let us recount this tale in full detail.

t_ch: （叫好）。
t_en: (cheer)

t_ch: 好，好！
t_en: Alright, alright!

t_ch: （沉默）。
t_en: (keep silent)

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 上回书说到，在那游云天君后继者的号召下，公司、天才、调律者，乃至云骑大军，皆云集于此役，誓要将大敌彻底扼杀。
t_en: As the tale left off, under the call of the successor to the Cloudstrider, the IPC, the Geniuses, the Tuners, and even the great army of the Cloud Knights all gathered for this campaign, vowing to utterly annihilate the great foe.

t_ch: 要说起那场面，可真是：万顷星海非空域，千帆沓来舸满津。
t_en: And of that spectacle, one might truly say: The starry sea stretched vast, no void within. A thousand sails pressed forward, filling every harbor.

t_ch: 而翁星中，白厄真君以身束缚大敌，十二金仙与之殊死搏斗。但见金丝浮荡、剑影刀光，破空飞矢、淋漓拳脚；自也有，烈风暴雨、奇术技巧，枪尖游龙、棋出杀招。
t_en: In the heart of Amphoreus, Lord Phainon restrained the enemy with his very body, while the Twelve Golden Immortals fought it in a battle to the death. Golden threads shimmered and drifted, blades and sword-lights flashed like lightning, arrows split the air, fists flew in a deadly dance. Then came storms and tempests, wondrous arts and cunning stratagems, spearpoints like swimming dragons, and lethal chess plays.

t_ch: 只是「铁墓」身具三千万世所积愤怒，又有谁能为其敌手？可惜啊可惜，恨雨仇云遮天幕，三军尽灭万事休。
t_en: Yet Irontomb bore within it the rage of thirty million lifetimes... Who could stand against such an adversary? Alas, alas! Vengeful rain and hateful clouds veiled the heavens, the three armies were destroyed, and all was brought to ruin.

t_ch: （叹息）。
t_en: (sigh)

t_ch: 唉，你说这……
t_en: *sigh* This is so...

t_ch: （沉默）。
t_en: (keep silent)

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 列位看官，生死关头，你道是谁力挽狂澜？是那游云天君的后继者、灰色的救主，身携三千万世追忆，驱使万亿黄金火种，将那已近成型的大敌彻底击溃。
t_en: Good sirs and ladies, at that brink of life and death, who do you think turned back the tide? It was the successor of the Cloudstrider, the Gray Savior, bearing the memories of thirty million lifetimes, wielding the power of trillions of golden Coreflames, who struck down the enemy just as it neared completion.

t_ch: 只可惜，不尽轮回，徒留银河一闪，万千追忆，化作故事一页。翁星就此归于原点。
t_en: Yet, alas, after all has been said and done about the endless cycle, all that remained was but a flash across the cosmos, thousands upon thousands of memories dissolving into a single page of story. Amphoreus returned then to its origin.

t_ch: 那遮天蔽日的巨木、停于半空的悬锋、流淌金血的英雄浴池…终有一日，此番盛景将重现宇宙；可惜，即便你我寿数绵长，恐怕也只能留待后人瞻仰了。
t_en: That sky-shrouding giant tree, the suspended peak of Kremnos, the hero's bath flowing with golden blood... One day, this splendid vision shall reappear in the universe. But, though our lifespans be long, I fear it shall be left for later generations to behold.

t_ch: （叹息）。
t_en: (sigh)

t_ch: 唉，你说这……
t_en: *sigh* This is so...

t_ch: （沉默）。
t_en: (keep silent)

t_ch: 然后呢？
t_en: Go on.

t_ch: 列位看官，翁星翻覆千轮事，都付于你我笑谈。若是大限之后，老朽能与那群黄金裔英雄一同，让故事代自己为诸位铭记，倒也算妙事一桩。
t_en: Good sirs and ladies, the countless turns of Amphoreus's fate are now entrusted to our cheers and chatter. Should it be, when my final hour arrives, that this old man may join those Chrysos Heir heroes, and let the tale remember me on your behalf... Why, that would be a fine thing indeed.

t_ch: 大梦一场终有醒时，好戏一台总要落幕。屏风一闭，醒木一拍，且做闲人袖手看。故事就此告一段落。
t_en: Every great dream must end in waking, every grand play must have its curtain drawn. When the screen is drawn and the gavel struck, let us fold our arms and watch as idle spectators. Thus, the story comes to its close.

t_ch: 我和知更鸟约在驾驶室碰面…她不会又伪装成智械吧？
t_en: I'm meeting Robin at the cockpit... She's not gonna pretend to be an Intellitron again, is she?

t_ch: 恭迎船长归位！
t_en: Welcome back to your post, Captain!

t_ch: 那场对抗「毁灭」的征程，还有它背后的事迹，应当被更多人知晓。
t_en: The journey against the Destruction, and the stories behind it, should be known by more people.

t_ch: 我认识几家出版商，他们能根据样书制作梦泡，在匹诺康尼上市。不过……
t_en: I know a few publishers who can make dream bubbles based on sample books and put them on the market in Penacony. However...

t_ch: 你知道的，匹诺康尼是一座被糖浆包裹的国度。我担心对于梦里的人们，英雄史诗太过沉重。
t_en: As you know, Penacony is a realm wrapped in syrup. I worry that epic tales of heroes might be too heavy for those living in dreams.

t_ch: 我们能做的，只有把它摆到货架上。能否在竞争中生存下来，不确定性太多……
t_en: All we can do is put it on the shelf. Whether it survives the competition... there are too many uncertainties...

t_ch: 但我想，{NICKNAME}，遵从你内心的想法就好。人只能讲述自己相信的故事。
t_en: But I think, {NICKNAME}, you should just follow what your heart tells you. People can only tell stories they truly believe in.

t_ch: 等你考虑好了，就去找爱德华医生吧。我会说服奥帝先生提供协助，回头见啦。
t_en: Once you've made up your mind, go see Dr. Edward. I'll convince Mr. Oti to help out. See you later!

t_ch: 在匹诺康尼，梦想必须遵从现实，《如我所书》也不例外。
t_en: In Penacony, dreams must conform to reality, and As I've Written is no exception.

t_ch: 你会如何选择呢？好在这里是梦境，家具也会开口说话，不妨听听它们的建议吧。
t_en: What will you choose? Lucky for you, this is a dreamscape where furniture can talk. Why not hear what they have to say?

t_ch: 你走近控制台，四根操控杆激动地来回摆弄，仿佛在向你招手。
t_en: You approach the control console, and the four control levers wiggle excitedly back and forth, as if waving at you.

t_ch: 船长，快看我，我是操控杆，最擅长操控人心。
t_en: Captain, look at me! I'm the control stick, and I'm an expert at controlling hearts!

t_ch: 相信我，只要为结局做一丢丢修改，让它不那么完美，保准有一大群人爱得死去活来呀！
t_en: Trust me. Just tweak the ending a tiny bit to make it less perfect, and people will absolutely go crazy for it!

t_ch: 操纵杆摆动着，发出响亮的嘎吱声。
t_en: The control stick shakes, making loud creaking noises.

t_ch: 装花的瓶子，看起来有些昂贵。你靠近时，一个慵懒的声音从中响起。
t_en: A vase with flowers in it. It looks quite expensive. As you approach, a languid voice echoes from within.

t_ch: 亲爱的船长，你想起我了吗？我注视你很久了……
t_en: Dear captain, do you remember me? I've been watching you for quite a while...

t_ch: 把故事讲给我听，我教你做小众的艺术吧。只要沉浸在自己的世界里，就不会受伤。
t_en: Tell me your story, and I'll teach you about niche art. As long as you immerse yourself in your own world, you won't get hurt.

t_ch: 花瓶沉浸在它的世界里，静悄悄的。
t_en: The vase is immersed in its own world, completely silent.

t_ch: 老式电话机盯着你，偶尔转动眼珠，像一只猫头鹰。
t_en: The vintage dial phone stares at you, occasionally rolling its eyeballs like an owl.

t_ch: 船长，你知道吗？我以前不是电话，而是一只猫头鹰。但现在，我不是猫头鹰，而是一台电话。
t_en: Captain, did you know that I wasn't always a dial phone? I used to be an owl. But I'm not an owl anymore, I'm a dial phone.

t_ch: 猜猜看，这是为什么？懂的都懂，不懂的说了也不懂。
t_en: Wanna take a guess why? If you know, you know. And if you don't, well, no amount of explaining will help.

t_ch: 谜语人滚出匹诺康尼。
t_en: Riddlers need to get out of Penacony.

t_ch: 你充分听取了家具们的建议，指导性几乎为零。
t_en: You take the furniture's advice to heart, which provides practically zero guidance.

t_ch: 看来，最后还得由你做出决断——毕竟，你才是故事的亲历者。
t_en: Looks like it's up to you to make the final verdict. After all, you're the one who lives through this story.

t_ch: 你无视了家具们的意见，决定相信自己。
t_en: You ignore the furniture's opinions and decide to trust yourself.

t_ch: 毕竟，你才是故事的亲历者。
t_en: After all, you're the one who lives through this story.

t_ch: 要修改内容吗……
t_en: Should I make some changes...?

t_ch: 你知道：在匹诺康尼，没有什么是严肃的。即便英雄的血泪史，也不过是茶余饭后的谈资。
t_en: As you know, nothing is taken seriously in Penacony. Even heroes' tales of blood and tears are just casual gossip over dinner.

t_ch: 你想起钟表小子、哈努兄弟、音符小姐…它们也曾是活生生的传奇。倘若《如我所书》以同样戏谑的形式被传唱，是你想要的结果吗？
t_en: You remember Clockie, Brother Hanu, Miss Note... they were all living legends once. If As I've Written gets passed down in the same mocking way, is that really what you want?

t_ch: 我相信翁法罗斯。
t_en: I believe in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 是啊。答案从一开始就再明显不过。三位无名客的故事，不就是最好的证明吗？
t_en: Yes. The answer was crystal clear from the start. The story of the three Nameless is the best proof of that, isn't it?

t_ch: 爱，友谊，愤怒，遗憾…一枚小小的梦泡，竟蕴含着如此复杂的情感，就像往陶罐里倒了满满一瓶伏特加。
t_en: Love, friendship, rage, regret... Such a tiny dream bubble contains such complex emotions. It's like pouring a whole bottle of vodka into a dolium.

t_ch: 感谢您提供的记忆，这是我的判断：它一定会大受欢迎。
t_en: Thank you for providing the memories. Here's my verdict: It's bound to be a huge hit.

t_ch: 就算结果不如预期，我也可以让各位英雄在创世涡心跳一段踢踏舞，同样能收获巨大的成功。
t_en: Even if the results aren't what we expected, I can still have the heroes tap dance in the Vortex of Genesis. That'll be just as big a success.

t_ch: 哈哈，开个小玩笑。您大可放心，我是专业的梦泡收藏家，知道什么能成功，什么不能。
t_en: Haha, just kidding. Rest assured. I'm a professional dream bubble collector. I know what can and can't be successful.

t_ch: 就这样，《如我所书》在匹诺康尼上市了。
t_en: And so, As I've Written was published in Penacony.

t_ch: 有人猜背后离不开苜蓿草的扶持，猜得没错。这么大的人情，何乐而不为？
t_en: Some guessed the Alfalfa was behind it, and they weren't wrong. With such a big favor ready for the taking, why not use it?

t_ch: 就让年轻人继续闹腾下去吧。万一哪天，{F#她们}{M#他们}真的能改变寰宇呢？
t_en: Let the young folks keep stirring things up. Who knows? Maybe they will actually change the universe one day.

t_ch: 泰坦、轮回、「智识陨落」…想象力倒是挺丰富。
t_en: Titans, cycles, "Fall of the Erudition"... Quite the imagination there.

t_ch: 可惜，主题还是老套——不就是英雄打怪兽嘛，都看过一百遍了！
t_en: Too bad the plot is so cliché! It's just another story about heroes fighting monsters! We've seen that a hundred times already!

t_ch: 这叫王道。就因为看了还想看，这类题材才会经久不衰。
t_en: That's what you call a classic formula. People keep coming back for more, and that's why this theme never gets old.

t_ch: 而且，这故事可不是编的……
t_en: Not to mention this was based on a real story...

t_ch: 你没听星际和平播报吗？铁墓真的被击败了，宇宙中也诞生了文明的种子。
t_en: Haven't you heard the Interastral Peace Broadcast? Irontomb was really defeated, and the seeds of civilization have sprouted in the universe.

t_ch: 说不定有朝一日，我们就能走进那个忆质世界，跟书里的英雄面对面交谈了。
t_en: Maybe we'll be able to step into that memoria world one day and have face-to-face conversations with the heroes from that book.

t_ch: 忆质构成的世界？我不信，一定是橡木家族编出来的。
t_en: A world made of memoria? No way. That's gotta be something the Oak Family made up.

t_ch: 算了，你还是去影视乐园找钟表小子玩吧，当心别被异域迷因抓走。
t_en: Whatever. Just go hang out with Clockie at the theme park, and watch out for those alien memes trying to abduct you.

t_ch: 科员们依旧那么忙碌。嗯，是熟悉的空间站。
t_en: The researchers are still as busy as ever. Yep, this is the space station I know.

t_ch: 对，将受损舰船运往庇尔波因特，让公司报销……
t_en: Right. Let's send the damaged ships to Pier Point and have the IPC foot the bill...

t_ch: 这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。来得正巧，我有一个好消息和一个坏消息，想先听哪个？
t_en: Oh, if it isn't {NICKNAME}. Perfect timing. I've got good news and bad news. Which would you like to hear first?

t_ch: 坏消息。
t_en: Bad news.

t_ch: 嗯…仔细想想，先说坏消息有点缺乏铺垫。还是先听好的吧。
t_en: Hmm... Now that I think about it, starting with the bad news might be a bit too abrupt. Let me give you the good news first.

t_ch: 好消息。
t_en: Good news.

t_ch: 记得我送你的那艘歼星舰吗？好消息是，我从一位太空海盗手里收到了现货……
t_en: Remember that starnought I gave you? The good news is that I got one from a space pirate...

t_ch: 结果，正赶上他的舰队被抽调去对抗铁墓，那艘歼星舰…被击毁了。
t_en: But his fleet was dispatched to fight against the Irontomb, and that starnought... was destroyed.

t_ch: 我重新挂了笔求购订单。但这种大船，一时半会儿很难找到第二个卖家。
t_en: I've reposted my purchase order. But it'll be tough to find another seller anytime soon for a ship of that size.

t_ch: 其实，我也是为铁墓而来…
t_en: Actually, I'm here for Irontomb, too...

t_ch: 你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
t_en: You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...

t_ch: …不得不说，这主意比科员们的课题有趣多了。可惜你不需要融资，不然我肯定投个几亿信用点。
t_en: ...I have to say that this idea is way more interesting than the researchers' projects. It's a shame you don't need funding, or I'd definitely invest a few hundred million credits.

t_ch: 我念书那会儿，选修过「边缘星球史学」。第一堂课，老师就告诫我们：不要当真。
t_en: I took an elective called "History of Frontier Planets" back in my student days. The professor warned us on the first day not to take everything at face value.

t_ch: 许多世界都会在本土英雄传说中添加夸张成分，声称祖先的血脉继承自某位星神…到后来，离奇的身世都变成一种潮流了。
t_en: Many worlds add exaggerated elements to their local hero legends, claiming their ancestors' bloodlines are inherited from some Aeon... Eventually, having an extraordinary origin story became quite the trend.

t_ch: 但…故事不就是如此吗？只要相信的人够多，就会逐渐变成真实。
t_en: But... isn't that how stories work? When enough people believe in them, they gradually become reality.

t_ch: 我会帮忙把《如我所书》列为空间站必读书目——也许科员们对神话不感兴趣，可一提到这是黑塔女士的项目，就会像佩佩见了宇航服一样兴奋。
t_en: I'll get As I've Written added to the space station's required reading list. The researchers may not be interested in mythology, but once they hear it's Madam Herta's project, they'll get as excited as Peppy seeing a spacesuit.

t_ch: 说起来，黑塔呢？
t_en: Speaking of which, where's Herta?

t_ch: 黑塔女士她…有些消耗过度，还需要一些时间恢复。
t_en: Madam Herta has... overexerted herself. She still needs some time to recover.

t_ch: 谁说的？
t_en: Who said that?

t_ch: 区区绝灭大君，还不至于让我「消耗过度」。我只是没上线而已。
t_en: A mere Lord Ravager isn't enough to make me "overexert" myself. I just wasn't online, that's all.

t_ch: 公司那边非要拉人组建什么「同盟」。我受不了他们纠缠，就开启了自动应答模式。
t_en: The IPC keeps pestering me about forming some "alliance." I got tired of their nagging, so I just turned on auto-answering mode.

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}，再告诉你一个好消息：铁墓陨落后，权杖也一同报废了，但我和螺丝抢救出了绝大部分数据。
t_en: Oh right, {NICKNAME}. I've got some more good news. After Irontomb fell, the Scepter was ruined, but Screwy and I managed to salvage a majority of data.

t_ch: 它们对新生的翁法罗斯——姑且先这样称呼它——很关键。如果顺利，世界的演化能跳过无机生命阶段，向前迈进一大步。
t_en: They are crucial for the newborn Amphoreus. Well, let's call it that for now. If things go smoothly, the world's evolution can skip its inorganic life phase and take a big step forward.

t_ch: 螺丝和公司签订了专项协议。未来一段时间，他们会密切关注翁法罗斯的状态。
t_en: Screwy has signed a special agreement with the IPC. They will closely monitor the state of Amphoreus for a while.

t_ch: 那，昔涟呢？
t_en: So, what happened to Cyrene?

t_ch: 作为权杖的「心」，在铁墓席卷宇宙的瞬间，她也充盈万界，成为了群星的「记忆」。
t_en: As the "heart" of the Scepter, she, too, filled the cosmos in the instant when Irontomb swept across all of existence. She became the memories of the stars.

t_ch: 奔涌的虚数能量让她创造了奇迹：以{RUBY_B#记忆}「自我」{RUBY_E#}为摇篮，闭合翁法罗斯的因果，让一个世界从忆域中诞生。
t_en: The surging Imaginary Energy enabled her to create a miracle. With {RUBY_B#the Remembrance}her self{RUBY_E#} as the cradle, she closed the cycle of causality in Amphoreus, making a world emerge from the Memory Zone.

t_ch: 当然，我知道你想问的是结果。不妨这样理解吧，她…只是睡着了。她会重新睁开双眼，变回粉色的忆灵，再度踏上旅程，与你相遇……
t_en: Of course, I know you just want to hear the outcome. Let me put it this way. She's... just sleeping. Maybe she'll open her eyes again as a pink memosprite and once again embark on a journey to meet you...

t_ch: 只是这件事发生在「过去」。而在她的时间里，这一切就是「永恒」。
t_en: But that had already happened in the "past." In her subjective time, everything has become "eternal."

t_ch: …离开前，她是笑着的。所以，别难过——她也会这样劝你。
t_en: ...She was smiling when she left you. So, don't be sad. She'd tell you the same if she were here.

t_ch: 新的翁法罗斯要多久才能诞生？
t_en: How long until a new Amphoreus is born?

t_ch: 我…没法给你承诺。那颗星球会逐渐变成你熟悉的样子，但时间是未知数。
t_en: I... can't make any promises. That planet will gradually become how you remember it to be, but no one can tell when that'd be.

t_ch: 可能要一千个琥珀纪，也可能只要一两年。唯一能确定的是，你正在做的事，一定能促进它的生长。
t_en: It might take a thousand Amber Eras, or it might only take a year or two. The only thing for certain is that what you are doing will surely hasten its growth.

t_ch: 我的建议是：继续旅程，做好准备，也心怀希望。你知道，翁法罗斯这个世界，最不缺的就是奇迹。
t_en: My advice is: continue the journey, be prepared for the worst, but keep hope in your heart. You know that if there's one thing the world of Amphoreus isn't short of, it's miracles.

t_ch: 生命的第一因究竟是什么？
t_en: So what is the prime mover of life?

t_ch: 我和螺丝达成了共识：很遗憾，权杖的答案就是「毁灭」。你能在数据库中找到更详细的论述。
t_en: Screwy and I have reached a consensus on that. Regrettably, the answer given by the Scepter is indeed "Destruction." You can find a more detailed discussion in the database.

t_ch: 但这不是翁法罗斯的答案，我想，应该也不是你的。
t_en: But that's not Amphoreus's answer, and I don't imagine it's yours either.

t_ch: 对此，我有自己的见解，写在了批注里。如果你对这类问题感兴趣，也可以把它列为自己的课题。
t_en: I have my own insights on this, which I've written in the annotations. If you're interested in this kind of stuff, you can make it your own research topic.

t_ch: 我没有问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 那我先挂了，还有许多事要处理呢——黑塔，已下线。
t_en: Then I'll disconnect for now. Got lots of stuff to deal with. Herta, signing off.

t_ch: 其实黑塔女士一直惦记着翁法罗斯。上次她三句不离某样东西，还是收容星核的时候呢。
t_en: Madam Herta has actually been thinking about Amphoreus all this time. The last time she couldn't stop talking about something was when we contained the Stellaron.

t_ch: 《如我所书》的事就包在我们身上吧。等有了消息，我会再联络你的。
t_en: Leave As I've Written to us. I'll contact you again when we have news.

t_ch: 而且，最后一次演算的记录——你担任「负世」泰坦那次——至关重要。「开拓」会取代「毁灭」，净化这个世界。
t_en: Besides, the last extrapolation record, the one when you acted as the Worldbearing Titan, is crucial. The Trailblaze will replace the Destruction and purify this world.

t_ch: 你是说，黑塔女士召开了一场「俱乐部会议」，而且，有六位天才与会？这数字打破了俱乐部有史以来的最高记录！
t_en: You mean Madam Herta held a "Society meeting" and six geniuses actually attended? That's the highest number in the Society's history!

t_ch: 甚至连那位「寂静领主」，都听从了黑塔女士的号召？想到那场面，我…我简直无法呼吸！
t_en: Even that "Lord of Silence" answered Madam Herta's call!? Just thinking about that scene... I—I'm gonna hyperventilate!

t_ch: 杰克逊，冷静。请平复呼吸，生命体征检查器提示，你呼吸性碱中毒的可能正在直线上升。
t_en: Jackson, calm down. Take deep breaths. The vitals monitor shows that your respiratory alkalosis risk is skyrocketing.

t_ch: 呵呵，看看你心率抬升的斜率吧，我从来没在你的研究报表里见过如此激动人心的数据。
t_en: Heh, look at your heart rate spike! I've never seen such exciting data in any of your research reports.

t_ch: 伊萨卡，你最缺乏的就是洞悉数据本质的眼光。
t_en: Ithaca, what you lack most is the vision to see through the true nature of data.

t_ch: 刚才我心跳加速，是因为一个优雅的研究方向正在我脑海中成型。
t_en: My heart was racing because an elegant research direction was taking shape in my mind.

t_ch: 这谁能看出来？
t_en: No one would be able to tell that.

t_ch: 我只看到一个绝望的学者。
t_en: All I see is a desperate scholar.

t_ch: （先听到这里）
t_en: (Stop listening for now)

t_ch: 哦，说来听听？
t_en: Oh? Tell me about it.

t_ch: 听好了：我将以《如我所书》为研究对象，探寻神话历史、真实虚构的双向互动，为原始文明演化提供一整套可参考的理论资源。
t_en: Listen up: I'll be using As I've Written as my research subject to explore the two-way interaction between mythology and history, providing a complete theoretical framework for the evolution of primitive civilizations.

t_ch: 千万次轮回留下的遗产，如模拟宇宙提供的数据般珍贵。泰坦与泰坦造物的有机构成、黄金裔参与下的城邦机制、叙述者与文本互动关系……
t_en: The legacy left behind by countless cycles is as precious as the data provided by the Simulated Universe. The organic composition of Titans and their creations, the city-state mechanisms involving the Chrysos Heirs, the interactive relationship between narrators and texts...

t_ch: 好像都还近在眼前…
t_en: It all still feels like yesterday...

t_ch: 叽里咕噜说什么呢？
t_en: What's all that gibberish?

t_ch: （先听到这里）
t_en: (Stop listening for now)

t_ch: 嗯，听起来有模有样。然后呢？
t_en: Hmm, sounds decent. Then?

t_ch: 一张横亘历史学、神话学、人类学、生物学的学术蓝图正在我眼前徐徐展开——
t_en: An academic blueprint spanning history, mythology, anthropology, and biology is gradually unfolding before my eyes...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「翁法罗斯学」！</color>
t_en: It shall be named <color=#dbc291ff>"Amphoreology"!</color>

t_ch: 这个名字，将为数个琥珀纪以来一潭死水的人文学科掀起狂风骤雨！我只需如刻法勒般端坐源头，课题、经费便会如同黄金血般汩汩流向万千学者……
t_en: This name will stir up a storm in the waters of humanities that have been stagnant for several Amber Eras! I need only sit at the source like Kephale, and research topics and funding will flow like golden blood to thousands of scholars...

t_ch: 学术会议的邀请将纷至沓来，我将在会议开幕时第一个致辞。休息时，除非我先动手，否则没人敢碰茶歇！
t_en: Conference invitations will come pouring in, and I'll be the first to give a speech at the opening ceremony. During breaks, no one will dare touch the refreshments unless I make the first move!

t_ch: 反正都是幻想，你就不能想象得更出格一些吗？
t_en: Since it's all make-believe anyway, couldn't you let your imagination run a little wilder?

t_ch: 与此同时，会议方甚至会慷慨地报销一切住宿和往来费用！
t_en: On top of that, the conference organizers will generously cover all accommodation and travel expenses!

t_ch: 冷静，杰克逊，你呼吸性碱中毒的可能已经抵达临界值，冷静！
t_en: Calm down, Jackson. Your risk of respiratory alkalosis is reaching critical levels. Calm down!

t_ch: 终于，播种之旅告一段落，你回到了星穹列车……
t_en: At last, your journey of sowing has reached its end, and you return to the Astral Express...

t_ch: 回望来路，你讲述的翁法罗斯，在宇宙间深深扎下了根，静候发芽的那一天。
t_en: Looking back, the Amphoreus you spoke of has taken root deep across the universe, quietly awaiting the day it will sprout.

t_ch: 也许，这才是「创世」的最后一步。
t_en: Perhaps this is the final step of "Genesis."

t_ch: 在发什么呆呢？
t_en: What are you spacing out for?

t_ch: 是你们啊…
t_en: Oh, it's you guys...

t_ch: 你们也完成任务了？
t_en: You finished your missions, too?

t_ch: 那当然！再怎么说，翁法罗斯也是咱们仨一起开拓的。本姑娘可是一阵好跑。
t_en: Of course! After all, we three trailblazed through Amphoreus together. I ran my heart out for this!

t_ch: 离开塔拉萨时，我接到了三月的通讯，就顺道和她一起回来了。她在凯尔萨斯星遇到了点麻烦。
t_en: I received a message from March when I was leaving Thalassa, so I came back with her. She ran into some trouble on Kalsas.

t_ch: 别提了，人家本来就内向，又赶上联觉信标出故障…幸好丹恒会说粘土语。
t_en: Don't even get me started. I'm already shy as it is, and then the Synesthesia Beacon had to break down... Thank goodness Dan Heng can speak the Clayese language.

t_ch: 另外，我在纺锤-Ⅲ发现了形似奇美拉的新物种，此前完全没有记录。
t_en: Also, I discovered a new species resembling chimeras on Spindle-III. There were no prior records of it.

t_ch: 那岂不是还有可能出现住满大地兽的星球？
t_en: Does that mean there could be planets completely filled with dromases?

t_ch: 等姬子和杨叔回来，再统一做复盘吧。不妨先休息一会儿，{NICKNAME}看起来也有些累了。
t_en: Let's wait for Himeko and Mr. Yang to come back before we do a full debrief. You should rest for now, {NICKNAME}, you look tired.

t_ch: 是哦，那待会儿见啦。
t_en: Yeah. See you in a bit then!

t_ch: 世界前所未有地安静，仿佛能听见心跳的声音。
t_en: The world has never been so quiet. It is as though you could hear the sound of heartbeats.

t_ch: 这便是你为翁法罗斯写下的最后一笔。它何时会回应，只有命运知晓答案。
t_en: This is the final stroke you write for Amphoreus. Only fate knows when it will respond.

t_ch: 但你知道，无论「明天」还是「明天的明天」，都在「开拓」前行的路上。并非两条平行线，而是必然交汇的那一点。
t_en: But you know, whether it's "tomorrow" or "the day after tomorrow," they're all on the path of the Trailblaze. Not as parallel lines, but as points destined to converge.

t_ch: 坚定些，目光要一直看向前方呀♪
t_en: Stay strong. Eyes forward, always ♪

t_ch: 翁法罗斯，明天见。
t_en: See you tomorrow, Amphoreus.

t_ch: 贝洛伯格没受到什么影响，太好了。
t_en: Belobog wasn't affected much, thank goodness.

t_ch: 快看，是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Look, it's {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这次{F#她}{M#他}拯救了宇宙。
t_en: {F#She}{M#He} saved the universe this time.

t_ch: 我们的光！
t_en: Our light!

t_ch: 翁法罗斯有几个月亮？
t_en: How many moons does Amphoreus have?

t_ch: 听说以前有六个…
t_en: Heard there used to be six...

t_ch: 那比我们多诶。
t_en: That's more than we've got.

t_ch: 你也来买《如我所书》呢？
t_en: Oh, you're here to buy As I've Written too?

t_ch: 《如我所书》今天又售罄了…
t_en: As I've Written is sold out again today...

t_ch: 今天讲《如我所书》哪一段啊？
t_en: Which part of As I've Written are we covering today?

t_ch: 嘘，听了不就知道了！
t_en: Shh, just listen and you'll find out!

t_ch: 迈德漠斯，真是翁星好儿郎！
t_en: Mydeimos, you're a true son of Amphoreus!

t_ch: 嘘，后头白厄真君那段更精彩！
t_en: Shh. The part about Lord Phainon is even better!

t_ch: 白厄真君，竟有这么一段奇事…
t_en: Did this really happen to Lord Phainon...

t_ch: 嘘，该讲十二金仙讨大君了！
t_en: Shh. It's time for the tale of the Twelve Golden Immortals challenging the Lord Ravager!

t_ch: 你说，这白厄真君和景元将军，孰强孰弱啊？
t_en: Who do you think is stronger, Lord Phainon or General Jing Yuan?

t_ch: 嘶…要不你去问问将军？
t_en: Tch... why don't you go ask the General?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯？由忆质构成的世界？胡扯！
t_en: Amphoreus? A world made of memoria? What a joke!

t_ch: 你要不看看自己在哪？
t_en: You might want to check where you're standing.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯…我要是也能模拟出一个世界就好了。
t_en: Amphoreus... if only I could simulate a world like that.

t_ch: 劝你别打这个主意，生命总会找到出路的。
t_en: Don't even think about it. Life always finds a way.

t_ch: 放心好了，戏曲、说书、相声…对于脍炙人口的故事，罗浮从不缺乏传播的手段。
t_en: Rest assured, whether through opera, storytelling, or crosstalk... The Luofu never lacks ways to spread stories that capture people's hearts.

t_ch: 《如我所书》一事，我会尽力去办，绝不让英雄事迹被星空埋没。
t_en: Regarding As I've Written, I will do my utmost, and won't let these heroic deeds be buried by the stars.

t_ch: 《如我所书》的事就包在我们身上吧。等有了消息，我会再联络你的。
t_en: Leave As I've Written to us. I'll contact you again when we have news.

t_ch: 黑塔已经从这台人偶中离线，任你如何招呼都没有反应。
t_en: Herta has gone offline from this puppet. No matter how you try to get her attention, there's no response.

t_ch: 嗨，想我了吗？
t_en: Hi, miss me yet?

t_ch: 欢迎光临我们一起写下的故事，这一页因你而存在的「永恒」♪
t_en: Welcome to the story we wrote together! This page of "Eternity" exists because of you ♪

t_ch: 昔涟！原来你还在…
t_en: Cyrene! So you're still here...

t_ch: 这是我们共同的「记忆」。
t_en: This is our shared memories.

t_ch: 你还能陪在我们身边吗？
t_en: Can you stay with us?

t_ch: 少女莞尔一笑。她预见到你会在这一刻迟疑、感慨或发问。
t_en: The young girl smiled faintly. She had foreseen that at this moment you would hesitate, sigh, or pose a question.

t_ch: 片刻过后，你也回过了神…眼前的「她」只是一笔留在过去的墨痕：只能捎来信息，无法交换言语。
t_en: A moment later, you too regained your senses... The "her" before you was nothing more than an ink trace left from the past: able only to carry a message, unable to exchange words.

t_ch: 抱歉啦，只能通过这种方式给你留言……
t_en: Sorry, this was the only way I could leave you a message...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们在「记忆」的路上一起走出了很远很远的距离。虽然*我*记忆中的翁法罗斯会永远轮回下去，将铁墓封印在过去……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, we've come such a long, long way together on the path of Remembrance. Even though the Amphoreus in my memories will forever continue its cycles, sealing the Irontomb in the past...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>但被*你*记住的人们，这篇故事，还有这座永恒的花园，会一直陪在你的身边，作为《如我所书》的一部分，同星穹列车一直「开拓」下去♪</color>
t_en: But those who remember you, this story, and this eternal garden will always stay by your side, as part of As I've Written, continuing to Trailblaze with the Astral Express ♪

t_ch: 少女停顿了一下，眨了眨眼。
t_en: The girl paused for a moment, blinking her eyes.

t_ch: 总有一天，记忆会结出果实。
t_en: One day, memories will bear fruit.

t_ch: 我会带他们遍历星空。
t_en: I'll take them across the stars.

t_ch: 我相信，我们一定会重逢。
t_en: I believe we'll meet again.

t_ch: 嘻，虽然很难猜出{NICKNAME}的想法……
t_en: Heh, even though it's hard to guess what you are thinking, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 但一句发自肺腑的「谢谢」，肯定能让你心里的小花绽放吧？
t_en: ...A heartfelt "thank you" would surely make the little flower in your heart bloom, right?

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}♪
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME} ♪

t_ch: 啊，对啦……
t_en: Oh, that's right...

t_ch: 如果有时间，<color=#dbc291ff>记得回到记忆中的小村庄，去看看「我」呀？</color>
t_en: If you have time, <color=#dbc291ff>can you please visit "me" in that little village in the memory?</color>

t_ch: 说不定，我还准备了一份粉色的小礼物呢♪
t_en: Who knows, I might have prepared a little pink present for you ♪

t_ch: 这座花园，是《如我所书》的最后一页…
t_en: This garden is the final page of As I've Written...

t_ch: 你看见：星云绽放光芒，勾勒出花圃的轮廓。一个新生的世界将要萌芽。
t_en: You see: The nebula blooms with radiance, tracing the silhouette of a garden. A newborn world is about to sprout.

t_ch: 这一幕是《如我所书》的结局，也是现实中翁法罗斯的原点：总有一天，它将孕育出真正的生命。记忆中的人们，会一一诞生，在「明天」等候你。
t_en: This scene is the ending of As I've Written, and also the origin point of the Amphoreus in the real world: One day, it will give birth to true life. The people in the memory will be born one by one, waiting for you "tomorrow."

t_ch: 群星静静呼吸。你确信，翁法罗斯的「果」已经种下。
t_en: The stars breathe silently. You are certain that the fruit of Amphoreus has been planted.

t_ch: 但它的「因」呢？在那一天到来前，旅途仍将继续。无穷的可能性在你脚下铺开，只有「记忆」……
t_en: But what about its "cause"? Until that day comes, the journey continues. Endless possibilities unfold beneath your feet, and only "the memory"...

t_ch: 只有「记忆」，仍被留在昨天。
t_en: Only "the memory" remains in yesterday.

t_ch: 我不想独自启程。
t_en: I don't want to set off alone.

t_ch: 或许，还可以做点什么。
t_en: Perhaps there's still something I can do.

t_ch: 你想起「开拓」的承诺：逐火的故事将传唱群星。人们会记得，翁法罗斯是一个辉煌、壮丽的世界。
t_en: You recall the promise of Trailblaze: the story of Flame-Chase will echo across the stars. People will remember that Amphoreus was a brilliant, magnificent world.

t_ch: 你想到：可以让更多人阅读《如我所书》，留下这个世界的记忆。如果这么做，因果会变得更加坚固…你无法确信，但愿意相信。
t_en: You think: you can let more people read As I've Written, preserving the memories of this world. If you do this, the causality will become more stable... You can't be certain, but you're willing to believe.

t_ch: 重要的是，这是一个约定，你和许多人的约定。
t_en: What matters is that this is a promise, shared between you and many others.

t_ch: 也许，是时候履行诺言了。
t_en: Perhaps it's time to fulfill my promise.

t_ch: 米哈伊尔一向欢迎来访者。对于那些迷路的人，他总会给出指引。
t_en: Mikhail always welcomes visitors. For those who lose their way, he never fails to point them in the right direction.

t_ch: 但你的表情里没有困惑。我猜，你不是来寻求答案的。
t_en: But there's no confusion in your expression. I'm guessing you're not here for answers.

t_ch: 我完成了一趟开拓。
t_en: I completed a Trailblaze journey.

t_ch: 没错。我去了一个阿基维利也未曾抵达的世界，完成了前所未有的「开拓」……
t_en: That's right. I went to a world that even Akivili never reached, and accomplished an unprecedented "Trailblaze"...

t_ch: 我留下了难忘的回忆。
t_en: I made unforgettable memories.

t_ch: 没错。我在一趟旅途中认识了许多同行者，留下了弥足珍贵的回忆……
t_en: That's right. During my journey, I met many fellow pathstriders and made precious memories...

t_ch: 我是为讲述而来。
t_en: I'm here to tell a story.

t_ch: 没错。我与另一位作者一同，将「开拓」的旅程写成了书。这次，是为讲述而来……
t_en: That's right. Together with another author, I wrote a book about the Trailblaze journey. This time, I'm here to tell that story...

t_ch: 这段经历，想和前人们分享。
t_en: I want to share this experience with those who came before.

t_ch: 好啊，好。那就让他们听听，是个怎样的故事吧。
t_en: Alright, alright. Let's tell them what kind of story this really is.

t_ch: 是啊，翁法罗斯发生了太多事，三言两语要如何概括？这场讲述，恐怕会持续很久……
t_en: Yeah, so much has happened in Amphoreus. How could I sum it all up in just a few words? This story... I'm afraid it's going to take a while...

t_ch: （先从翁法罗斯这个世界开始吧。）
t_en: (Let's start with the world of Amphoreus.)

t_ch: 一个英雄辈出的世界。
t_en: A world where heroes rise.

t_ch: 那是一个行将消亡，却英雄辈出的世界。在逐火的征程中，黄金裔前赴后继，凡人们也众志成城。这是一首颂唱人性的赞歌，一段英雄之旅。
t_en: It was a world on the brink of extinction, yet teeming with heroes. In the Flame-Chase Journey, the Chrysos Heirs marched on one after another, while mortals stood united. This is an ode celebrating humanity, a hero's journey.

t_ch: 一个始终如一的世界。
t_en: A world that never changed.

t_ch: 那是一个囿于轮回，却从不言弃的世界。即便经历永劫的苦难，人们也会踏上相同的道路，做出一样的选择。它超越时间，是真正的「永恒之地」。
t_en: It is a world bound by cycles, yet also one that never surrenders. Even through eternal suffering, people will walk the same path and make the same choices. Transcending time itself, it is the true "Eternal Land."

t_ch: 一个反抗命运的世界。
t_en: A world that defies destiny.

t_ch: 那是一个诞生自阴谋和罪恶，却与「毁灭」一同燃尽的世界。在冰冷而沉重的命运前，它没有倒下，倒下的是命运。
t_en: It was a world born of conspiracy and sin, yet burned away alongside "Destruction." Before the cold and heavy destiny, it did not fall. But destiny itself did.

t_ch: （然后，是这段旅途的意义……）
t_en: (And now, for the meaning of this journey...)

t_ch: 让封闭的世界拥抱了群星。
t_en: Let the closed world embrace the stars.

t_ch: 在你抵达前，翁法罗斯几乎无人知晓。因列车到来，它得以冲破囚笼，奔向群星。
t_en: Before your arrival, Amphoreus was virtually unknown. Thanks to the Express, it broke free from its cage and raced toward the stars.

t_ch: 「开拓」不只是向前迈步，也同样是一份连结诸界的责任。经此一站，你似乎对阿基维利启程的信念有了更多理解。
t_en: "Trailblaze" isn't just about moving forward, it's also the responsibility of connecting worlds. After this stop, you seem to better understand the conviction behind Akivili's departure.

t_ch: （当初留在匹诺康尼时，米哈伊尔是否也是同样的心情？）
t_en: (Did Mikhail feel the same way when he stayed in Penacony back then?)

t_ch: 与「毁灭」展开了对决。
t_en: Engaged in a showdown with Destruction.

t_ch: 你第一次直面一位绝灭大君——和仙舟时不同，这场战役的代价太过沉重。反物质军团的威胁，于你已经不再是远方星空的明灭。
t_en: For the first time, you faced a Lord Ravager head-on. Unlike in the Xianzhou, the cost of this battle was far too hefty. The threat of the Antimatter Legion is no longer just a flickering light in the distant stars.

t_ch: 米哈伊尔也好，历任领航员也罢，每个时代的「开拓」都有其意义。而阻挡在你面前的迷雾，似乎越来越清晰……
t_en: Be it Mikhail or any Navigator before, each era's Trailblaze has its own significance. And the fog that stands in your way seems to be getting clearer...

t_ch: （毁灭、虚无、同谐、还有……）
t_en: (Destruction, Nihility, Harmony, and...)

t_ch: 邂逅了无比珍贵的同道。
t_en: Met precious kindred spirits.

t_ch: 作为逐火的一员，你也投身于翁法罗斯伟大的征程。你与英雄们邂逅、结缘，共创伟业。作为旅行者，你留下的足迹已足够遥远。
t_en: As a member of the Flame-Chasers, you've joined Amphoreus's grand journey. You've encountered heroes, forged bonds, and achieved greatness together. As a traveler, your footprints have already reached far and wide.

t_ch: 「开拓」向来如此。探索、了解、建立、连结；但旅程总有下一站。当启程的笛声响起，列车就会离去，带着所有的回忆。
t_en: Such is the way of the Trailblaze. Explore, understand, build, and connect. But there's always a next stop on this journey. When the whistle of departure sounds, the Express will leave, carrying all memories with it.

t_ch: （但星星会记得，每一篇史诗的名字。）
t_en: (But the stars will remember the name of every epic.)

t_ch: （看来，这场开拓……）
t_en: (Looks like this Trailblaze...)

t_ch: 让许多人获得了成长。
t_en: Helped many people grow.

t_ch: 只是星空一隅的所见。
t_en: Just a glimpse of a corner of the starry sky.

t_ch: 是银河命运的转折点。
t_en: A turning point in the cosmic destiny.

t_ch: 是迈向新一站的起点。
t_en: The starting point for our next destination.

t_ch: 是我不会忘记的故事。
t_en: A story I'll never forget.

t_ch: 我想好了。就从头开始讲起……
t_en: I've made up my mind. Let me start from the beginning...

t_ch: 你在这片梦中梦里度过了不知多久。当故事结束时，你内心的某簇情感也变得更加强烈，像一枚燃烧的火种。
t_en: You spent countless moments in this dream within a dream. As the story ended, a certain emotion in your heart grew stronger, like a burning ember.

t_ch: 梦里的消息不似外面那般灵通。这故事的每一个情节，都出乎我的意料。
t_en: News doesn't travel as fast in dreams. Every plot twist in this story caught me completely off guard.

t_ch: 谢谢你，看来不需要多说什么了。
t_en: Thanks, I guess that's all that needs to be said.

t_ch: 我想，米哈伊尔会为你们感到骄傲的。
t_en: I think Mikhail would be proud of you all.

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: 佩佩！
t_en: Peppy!

t_ch: <size=28>——佩佩！！你透明度怎么只剩<unbreak>50</unbreak>％了！！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Peppy! Why is your opacity down to <unbreak>50%</unbreak>!?</size>

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof!

t_ch: 难道佩佩遭遇了什么意外？
t_en: Could something have happened to him?

t_ch: （还是得找艾丝妲确认一下。）
t_en: (I should check with Asta to be sure.)

t_ch: 该通知家属了…
t_en: Time to notify the next of kin...

t_ch: （…无论如何，先联系艾丝妲吧。）
t_en: (...Anyway, I should contact Asta first.)

t_ch: 二维市@门附近…你挠了挠头，突然意识到：那不就是你所在的地方吗？难道说……
t_en: Near Duomension City's @Gate... You scratch your head as it suddenly hits you: isn't that exactly where you are? That means...

t_ch: （鼻子不会骗小狗，果然是{NICKNAME}的味道！）
t_en: (A dog's nose never lies. I knew it was {NICKNAME}'s scent!)

t_ch: 又一个佩佩！
t_en: Another Peppy!

t_ch: （跟你天下第一好的佩佩不是就我一个吗？哪来的……）
t_en: (Aren't I your one and only bestie Peppy? What do you mean "another"...)

t_ch: <size=28>（汪！又一个佩佩！）</size>
t_en: <size=28>(Woof! Another Peppy!)</size>

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof!

t_ch: （不对不对，我才是真佩佩！你没有自己的名字吗？）
t_en: (No no. I'M Peppy! Don't you have your own name?)

t_ch: 汪唔——汪！
t_en: Woof mmrph! Woof!

t_ch: （就说你是假的吧，佩佩才不会坐火箭来这，佩佩是和艾丝妲一起坐飞船过来的！）
t_en: (I knew you were a fake! Peppy would never come here by a rocket. Peppy came on a spaceship with Asta!)

t_ch: 幽灵佩佩气急败坏地在原地直瞪眼，最后无奈用鼻头拱了拱佩佩。
t_en: Ghost Peppy stands there fuming, glaring in frustration before finally giving up and gently nudging Peppy with its nose.

t_ch: （…哦哦，原来你就是火箭呀…不好意思汪，我外狗语学得一般嘛。）
t_en: (...Oh, so you're Rocket... Sorry about that, woof. My dog language isn't that great.)

t_ch: 你们怎么长一模一样！
t_en: Why do you two look exactly the same!?

t_ch: （这个问题要问狗妈妈的，问小狗，小狗也不知道呀！）
t_en: (You'd have to ask Mama Dog about that. The puppy wouldn't know!)

t_ch: 所以这只很像你的小狗叫火箭？
t_en: So your doppelgänger's called Rocket?

t_ch: （汪！这次我肯定翻译准了！）
t_en: (Woof! I'm sure I got the translation right this time!)

t_ch: 汪——汪汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof woof!

t_ch: （嗯？难道你还有话要说？）
t_en: (Hm? Got something else to say?)

t_ch: 两条小狗在你面前趴伏下来，你碰碰我的鼻子，我碰碰你的爪子，一番激烈而无声的交谈后，佩佩神色凝重地点了点头。
t_en: The two puppies lie down before you, bumping noses and touching paws. After an intense but silent conversation, Peppy nods solemnly.

t_ch: （太过分了！这不是欺负狗吗？{NICKNAME}，我们一定要帮帮火箭！）
t_en: (That's so mean! That's bullying a dog! {NICKNAME}, we have to help Rocket!)

t_ch: （——听它说，有个幽灵把它最爱看的电视机卡住了，它希望我们救救电视机！）
t_en: (It said that a ghost got its favorite TV stuck, and it wants us to rescue the TV!)

t_ch: 你这翻译保真吗？
t_en: Is your translation legit?

t_ch: （应该？）
t_en: (Maybe?)

t_ch: 那听起来很紧急了。
t_en: That sounds pretty urgent.

t_ch: （火箭说，非常紧急！相当于一脚踹翻小狗的饭盆！）
t_en: (Rocket says it's SUPER urgent! It's like kicking over a puppy's food bowl!)

t_ch: 狗看电视机？
t_en: Dogs watch TV?

t_ch: 虽然奇怪，但在二相乐园，小狗怎么不能有电视瘾，小狗也要欢愉嘛！
t_en: Strange as it may be, why can't dogs be TV addicts in Planarcadia? Dogs deserve a taste of Elation, too!

t_ch: （世界上最好的{NICKNAME}，就帮帮小狗这个小忙吧。）
t_en: (Pretty please, the bestest and kindest {NICKNAME}. Help the poor pup out with this tiny favor.)

t_ch: 汪汪！唔汪——
t_en: Woof woof! Mmph woof!

t_ch: 真拿你没办法。
t_en: Ok, fine...

t_ch: 可我还要带你去找艾丝妲。
t_en: But you're still coming with me to Asta.

t_ch: （只要吃一小把狗粮的时间…佩佩平时吃得很快的……）
t_en: (It'll only take the time for Peppy to eat a handful of dog food... You know Peppy eats fast...)

t_ch: 两双豆豆眼可怜巴巴地看着你。哦，你怎么能忍心辜负这样热切恳求的目光？好吧好吧，小狗想要，小狗得到。你心甘情愿点了点头。
t_en: You are beset by two pairs of watery puppy eyes, gazing at you pleadingly. Oh, how could you possibly resist such earnest requests? Fine, fine... What a puppy wants, a puppy gets. You nod your head in willing surrender.

t_ch: （汪！{NICKNAME}最好啦！）
t_en: (Woof! {NICKNAME} is the best!)

t_ch: （火箭，快带我们出发去找那台电视吧！）
t_en: (Rocket, take us to the TV!)

t_ch: 汪~汪汪！汪唔……
t_en: Woof~ Woof woof! Woo...

t_ch: （我可以把我的奶油夹心骨头饼干给你吃，你别着急啦！）
t_en: (I can share my cream-filled bone biscuits with you, so don't get all worked up!)

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: （那个节目很好看吗！那太好了，我们可以一起边吃骨头饼干边看电视汪！）
t_en: (Is the show that good? Great, we can munch on bone biscuits and watch it together, woof!)

t_ch: 你好，这里不让睡觉。
t_en: Hi, no sleeping allowed here.

t_ch: 请把小狗的电视还给小狗。
t_en: Please give puppy's TV back to puppy.

t_ch: （怎么不说话？那我们就把你拔出来了哦！）
t_en: (Got nothing to say? Well then, we'll just have to pull you out!)

t_ch: 你点点头，比划着拽住幽灵。佩佩也跟着咬紧你的裤脚，而火箭则叼起了佩佩的尾巴。
t_en: You nod and mime the grabbing of the ghost. Peppy follows suit by clamping onto your leg, while Rocket holds onto Peppy's tail.

t_ch: ——你们一人二狗同心合力！
t_en: One human and two dogs, working together as one!

t_ch: 拔！
t_en: Pull!

t_ch: 咚一声，幽灵从电视机中被成功拔出，砸得你们人仰马翻。
t_en: With a loud thud, the ghost has been successfully yanked out of the TV, sending the three of you sprawling in every direction.

t_ch: （太好了！有天下第一好搭档的配合，我们果然无所不能，连屏幕也没有损坏！）
t_en: (Awesome! With the world's best partner by my side, we really can do anything... and we didn't even damage the screen!)

t_ch: …出来了…出来了吗？
t_en: ...Am I... Am I outside?

t_ch: （没错没错，你出来了！）
t_en: (Yep yep, you're outside!)

t_ch: 怎么出来了…电视…我要进…电视…进…电视…让我进电视……
t_en: How did I get out... TV... I need to go in... into the TV... Let me into the TV...

t_ch: 为什么…不让我进电视…让我…让我…让我……
t_en: Why won't you... let me into the TV... Let me... let me... let me...

t_ch: <color=#eb4d3dff><size=28>——进、电、视、机！</size></color>
t_en: <color=#eb4d3dff><size=28>INTO THE TV!</size></color>

t_ch: （汪！吓死我了！）
t_en: (Woof! That's terrifying!)

t_ch: 她好像有点不太对。
t_en: Something seems off about her.

t_ch: 等等，还没到午夜吧！
t_en: Wait a sec, it's not midnight yet!

t_ch: 打开方式有误，快把她塞回去。
t_en: Bad introduction, quick, stuff her back inside!

t_ch: （别开玩笑了！）
t_en: (Now is not the time for joking around!)

t_ch: 孤独…好孤独，我只有一个人了，孤独，孤独，我的执念又失败了……
t_en: Lonely... so lonely. I'm all alone, lonely, lonely... My attachment... failed once again...

t_ch: 到电视机里去…到电视机里去…到电视机里去……
t_en: Back into the TV... into the TV... into the TV...

t_ch: （汪！我我我，我不拦你了，你进去吧，你进去吧！）
t_en: (Woof! I—I... I won't stop you anymore. You go ahead! Go back in!)

t_ch: 但我进不去…我一直在被电视机拒绝，明明我是个执念化作的幽灵…明明我的执念就是钻进这台电视机…可是我进不去…不，我本来可以进去。
t_en: But I can't get in... The TV keeps rejecting me, even though I'm a ghost born from attachment... even though my attachment is literally to get inside this TV... but I just can't... No, I could've been able to.

t_ch: 都怪你们…那是我离成功最近的一次…孤独，孤独…既然进不去电视机，不如……
t_en: It's all your fault... That was the closest I've ever been to getting in... Lonely, so alone... If I can't get inside, then...

t_ch: ——你们▀▄来陪我吧▄█
t_en: You can▀▄ join me▄█

t_ch: （啊啊啊啊啊，{NICKNAME}！）
t_en: (AAAHHHHH, {NICKNAME}!)

t_ch: 可以让佩佩陪你。
t_en: Peppy can keep you company.

t_ch: （啊啊啊啊啊，艾丝妲！）
t_en: (AAAHHHHH, Asta!)

t_ch: 就交给火箭吧。
t_en: Rocket, I choose you.

t_ch: 就让我陪你吧。
t_en: I'll keep you company.

t_ch: （呜呜，我会在明年的今天，给你叼来狗粮的。）
t_en: (*whimper* I'll remember to bring you dog food on this day next year.)
